name: Apple Strudel
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix apples with raisins, lemon rind, sugar, cinnamon, and almonds. Set aside.
2. Place one fillo leaf on a kitchen towel and brush lightly with melted butter.
3. Place a second leaf on top and brush with butter again. Repeat until 5 leaves have been used, using about half the butter.
4. Cook and stir bread crumbs with one-fourth cup of butter until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle three-quarters cup crumbs on the layered fillo leaves.
6. Mound one-half of the filling in a 3-inch strip along the narrow end of the fillo, leaving a two-inch border.
7. Lift the towel and use it to roll the leaves over the apples in a jelly-roll fashion.
8. Brush the top of the strudel with butter and sprinkle with two tablespoons crumbs.
9. Repeat the entire procedure for the second strudel.
10. Bake the strudels at 400 degrees F. for 20 to 25 minutes, until browned. Makes 2 strudels, serving 6 to 8 each.
